'''lozachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swanky|swanky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swanky|swanky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lozachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozachithi|lozachithi]] || [[word:lozachiji|lozachiji]] || [[word:lozachishi|lozachishi]] || [[word:lozachiki|lozachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozachuthuthu|lozachuthuthu]] || [[word:lozachujuju|lozachujuju]] || [[word:lozachushushu|lozachushushu]] || [[word:lozachukuku|lozachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozachuthu|lozachuthu]] || [[word:lozachuju|lozachuju]] || [[word:lozachushu|lozachushu]] || [[word:lozachuku|lozachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozachufthuf|lozachufthuf]] || [[word:lozachufjuf|lozachufjuf]] || [[word:lozachufshuf|lozachufshuf]] || [[word:lozachufkuf|lozachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozachethe|lozachethe]] || [[word:lozacheje|lozacheje]] || [[word:lozacheshe|lozacheshe]] || [[word:lozacheke|lozacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozachothotho|lozachothotho]] || [[word:lozachojojo|lozachojojo]] || [[word:lozachoshosho|lozachoshosho]] || [[word:lozachokoko|lozachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozachotho|lozachotho]] || [[word:lozachojo|lozachojo]] || [[word:lozachosho|lozachosho]] || [[word:lozachoko|lozachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozachofthof|lozachofthof]] || [[word:lozachofjof|lozachofjof]] || [[word:lozachofshof|lozachofshof]] || [[word:lozachofkof|lozachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfthĂŻf|lozachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfjĂŻf|lozachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfshĂŻf|lozachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfkĂŻf|lozachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lozachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lozachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lozachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lozachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfthĂŻf|lozachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfjĂŻf|lozachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfshĂŻf|lozachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfkĂŻf|lozachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfthĂŻf|lozachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfjĂŻf|lozachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfshĂŻf|lozachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lozachĂŻfkĂŻf|lozachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lozachĂŠthĂŠ|lozachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lozachĂŠjĂŠ|lozachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lozachĂŠshĂŠ|lozachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lozachĂŠkĂŠ|lozachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lozachathatha|lozachathatha]] || [[word:lozachajaja|lozachajaja]] || [[word:lozachashasha|lozachashasha]] || [[word:lozachakaka|lozachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lozachatha|lozachatha]] || [[word:lozachaja|lozachaja]] || [[word:lozachasha|lozachasha]] || [[word:lozachaka|lozachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lozachafthaf|lozachafthaf]] || [[word:lozachafjaf|lozachafjaf]] || [[word:lozachafshaf|lozachafshaf]] || [[word:lozachafkaf|lozachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lozachasha|lozachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lozachshĂ«sha|lozachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lozachrosha|lozachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lozachmusha|lozachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lozachyasha|lozachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golozachnkshĂ«sha|golozachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golozachnkrosha|golozachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golozachnkmusha|golozachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golozachnkyasha|golozachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lozazachasha|lozazachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lozazachshĂ«sha|lozazachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lozazachrosha|lozazachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lozazachmusha|lozazachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lozazachyasha|lozazachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golozazachnkshĂ«sha|golozazachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golozazachnkrosha|golozazachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golozazachnkmusha|golozazachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golozazachnkyasha|golozazachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lezĂŠchasha|lezĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lezĂŠchshĂ«sha|lezĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lezĂŠchrosha|lezĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lezĂŠchmusha|lezĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lezĂŠchyasha|lezĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golezĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|golezĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golezĂŠchnkrosha|golezĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golezĂŠchnkmusha|golezĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golezĂŠchnkyasha|golezĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lozfachasha|lozfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lozfachshĂ«sha|lozfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lozfachrosha|lozfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lozfachmusha|lozfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lozfachyasha|lozfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golozfachnkshĂ«sha|golozfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golozfachnkrosha|golozfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golozfachnkmusha|golozfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golozfachnkyasha|golozfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
